publications.title: PwnTillDawn: Corporate Network
publications.description: Advanced Active Directory exploitation in corporate environment. Kerberoasting, Golden Tickets, and lateral movement across multiple domains.

publications.title: PwnTillDawn: Web Application Pentesting
publications.description: Comprehensive web application security assessment on a complex e-commerce platform. SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, and business logic flaws.

publications.title: PwnTillDawn: Infrastructure Hardening
publications.description: Blue team perspective: Hardening misconfigured infrastructure. Analysis of common misconfigurations and remediation strategies.
